column2: What happens when people don't have your product?
column3:
What’s valuable and different about your product’s features?

• 2-7 words
• Be very specific
• No sales fluff
• Start with a power-verb (optional)
column4: Who cares most about your particular value prop?

column2: Other fantasy leagues make you build 11-person teams.
column4: Casual fantasy sports players who don't have time to follow an entire team.

column2: You communicate via text copy (email/project management tools) about a roadblock and the client misinterprets your desired tone
column3: Clearly communicate your desired tone and emotion, reducing the risk of misinterpretation

column2: Spending too much time typing out communications for follow up and project management tasks
column3: Be more efficient with follow up and project management tasks: give more context in less time with short videos

column2: Spending too much time typing out communication or being on live calls
column3: Maximize productivity without spending as much time using Slack, email, project management platforms or live calls

column2: You lack ways to engage clients in a meaningful way outside of live calls
column3: Develop and grow strong client and team member relationships without being on live calls

column2: Finishing strategy, project management or follow up tasks after hours because you don't have time during the work day
column3: Prioritize work life balance: Get more work done with fewer after-hours tasks
